snippet.title: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka | Superhit Romantic Rain Song | Andaaz
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of Bollywood romance with "Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka", a timeless melody from the blockbuster movie . Sung by the legendary voices of Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this evergreen rain song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and monsoon romance.

Featuring Akshay Kumar, Priyanka Chopra, and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most cherished romantic tracks of the 2000s.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka 
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta, and Priyanka Chopra
Singer: Alka Yagnik, Babul Supriyo
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Directed by: Raj Kanwar 


#AayegaMazaAbBarsaatKa #Andaaz #KumarSanu #AlkaYagnik #AkshayKumar #PriyankaChopra #LaraDutta #RomanticSong #RainSong #BollywoodSongs #HindiSongs #EvergreenHits #NadeemShravan #Sameer #ShreeKrishnaInternational

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of ‚ÄúALPHA‚Äù

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

We will update you if the plan changes.

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema‚Äôs first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Full Video: Chikiri Chikiri | Peddi | Ram Charan | Janhvi | Buchi Babu | AR Rahman | Mohit Chauhan
snippet.description:
üî•üé∂ Get ready to groove to the vibrant beats of "Chikiri Chikiri" from Peddi!

Featuring Ram Charan and Janhvi Kapoor, this energetic song blends electrifying visuals, catchy rhythms, and unforgettable musical brilliance. Composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman and brought to life by the dynamic vocals of Mohit Chauhan, Chikiri Chikiri is a celebration of music, dance, and cinematic grandeur.

Directed by Buchi Babu Sana, Peddi promises a larger-than-life entertainment experience.

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY ‚Äì New Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn‚Äôt remember him‚Äîand the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him‚Äîsparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn‚Äôt forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:

Sadie Sink

and Mark Ruffalo

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! üíÉ

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‚ÄòBandhu 2.0‚Äô from ‚ÄòCocktail 2‚Äô! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna

Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik

A review of Alpha‚Äôs trailer and why, despite its star power and ambition, it still feels trapped in the YRF Spy Universe formula‚Äîraising questions about whether Bollywood action cinema is evolving or simply repeating itself with a new face. #Alpha #PJExplained #thePJ

snippet.title: Aravindh - Music Video | Albuquerque Records | Anirudh Ravichander
snippet.description:
#Aravindh has arrived and how. Aravindh is every artist out there yearning for that one shot to show what they've got and with a heart full of hope to be seen, celebrated and loved.

snippet.title: Alpha Trailer Review & Analysis | Alia Bhatt | Sharvari | Bobby Deol
snippet.description:
The much awaited #alpha trailer is finally here with #aliabhatt #sharvariwagh #bobbydeol #anilkapoor and #hrithikroshan in a cameo. This may be the first time that YRF has revealed a major cameo of a star in their film. Why did they do so? I hope you like the video on:-

snippet.title: Ananthan Kaadu Trailer (Malayalam) | Arya | Jiyen Krishnakumar | Ajaneesh Loknath | Murali Gopy
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of Ananthan Kaadu starring Arya in the lead role.

Ananthan Kaadu arrives in theatres on 25 June 2026.

Directed by Jiyen Krishnakumar, written by Murali Gopy, and produced by S. Vinod Kumar under the banner of Mini Studio's. Music composed by B. Ajaneesh Loknath.

Cast:
Arya, Indrans, , Sunil, Nikhila Vimal,  Regena Cassandrra, Siddique, Ajay, Bose Venkat, Dev Mohan, Renji Panicker, Anjali P Nair, Santhy Balachandran, Achyuth Kumar, Vijayaraghavan, Sagar Surya, Alsyn Benny, Sarath Appani

Movie Credits:

Director: Jiyen Krishnakumar
Writer: Murali Gopy
Producer: S. Vinod Kumar
DOP: S. Yuva
Editor: Rohit V. S Variyath
Music: B. Ajaneesh Loknath
Lyrics: Nishanth Raju
Singer: Deepak Blue
Executive Producer: Jain Paul
Production Designer: Ranjith Kotheri
Action Director: R. Sakthi Saravanan
VFX Director: Binoy Sadasivan
Production Controller: Pranav Mohan
Makeup: Baiju S
Sound Mixing: Vishnu PC
Sound Design: Arun S Mani
Colourist: Sivasankar V. B2H
Chief Associate Director: Abhil Anand M. T
Finance Controller: M. S Arun

Stills: Rishlal Unnikrishnan
Publicity Designer: Ma Mia Jo

Presented by Gokulam Gopalan, Baiju Gopalan, VC Praveen & Krishnamoorthy.

Production Houses: Mini Studio's, Gokulam Movies, Dream Big Films.

This is a tale...
that almost became a...
TRUE STORY.

Follow the official channels for more updates on Ananthan Kaadu.

snippet.description:

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

Song Lyrics:
Kondsa, your work is carried out, with the whole village following you.

The children of the city are fans when they chant the name of Ram.

Come, let the ship sail and the procession sail, let the tradition of my village continue.

All the men are jailed, ships worth 80 lakhs sail.

Oh, the whole circle of friends, in which there is brotherhood.

Sirkod is the man with whom you fight in jail.

Oh, the world is your crazy fan, I praise you a lot.

When the enemy becomes you, I sacrifice my life.

Oh, let the eagle sail, let the sovereignty sail, O sons of those whose itch is gone.

Vaid, great scoundrel What, you're doing, let's go for treatment.
Come on, let the ship sail and the market go, let my Gama tradition continue.

All the jail-bound baoli, ships worth 80 lakhs sailed.
He had a Robin Hood-like image, I heard it all over Gama.

From the theke to Dabwali, and from the site to Gurgaon.
Come to Panchkula and Mahendragarh, work unabated.

Your son is the one holding the drum, the one blowing the khokha.
Let the music play, let the sound play, let the rule of the black diggal continue.

Your deep lath sings your songs, your home is proud.
Come on, let the ship sail and the market go, let my Gama tradition continue.

All the jail-bound baoli, Ships worth 80 lakhs sailed

en-US.description:
#TheReviewPoint

The trailer for Alpha has finally been released, and in this video, we'll give a detailed breakdown and honest review. Does Alia Bhatt look convincing in her action role? Is Bobby Deol the trailer's strongest point? And the biggest question: did YRF ruin its own biggest surprise by revealing Hrithik Roshan's cameo in the trailer?

In this review, we'll discuss:

* Alpha Trailer Breakdown
* Alia Bhatt's Performance
* Bobby Deol's Villain Analysis
* Hrithik Roshan's Cameo Reveal

Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Me Tujhme Nhi Shayad ‚Äì Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Me Tujhme Nhi Shayad ‚Äì Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Tu mujhme to hai...
par me tujhme nhi shayad.

Maine har dua me
sirf tera naam maanga tha...
par tera dil
mera ho na saka shayad.

Teri baaton me
apni duniya dekhi thi maine...
par teri duniya me
meri jagah hi nahi thi shayad.

‚ÄúMe Tujhme Nhi Shayad‚Äù
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo kisi ko apni rooh se bhi zyada chahta raha...
magar badle me
wahi mohabbat na paa saka.

Har yaad me tu hai...
har khwaab me tu hai...
magar sach ye hai ki
me tujhme nhi shayad.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
adhuri mohabbat bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚Äî

tu mujhme to hai...
me tujhme nhi shayad...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko9
beinteha chaha ho
aur phir ehsaas hua ho ki
wo aapko utna nahi chahta,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

üéôÔ∏è Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
üéß Vibe: Emotional ‚Ä¢ Deep ‚Ä¢ Heartbreak ‚Ä¢ Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.description:
11:11 ‚ú®
A song about finding home in someone when you least expect it. ‚ù§Ô∏è
"Tum Yun Mile Ho" by Reet Talwar, Badshah & Hiten is for everyone who's ever wished for a love like this. 

#badshah #indiemusic #ipop #desipop #lovesong 

Lyrics:- 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Jee Toh Rahe The Par Saansein Nahi Thi
Milne Ki Kisi Ko Bhi Aasein Nahi Thi
 
Banjar Zameen Pe Jaise Barsa Ho Saawan
Aise Mile Tum Aake Mujhko o Saajan
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho
Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Jaise Akhri Panne ki Shayari 
Jaise Bistar Ke Niche Pade Paise
Jaise Kisi Marte Hue Ko Saans Aayi Ho Tum Aake Mujhe Mili Bilkul Hi Vaise
Har Raat Ab Nahi Chahiye Naye Chehre
Har Baat Meri Aake Tujhpe Hi Thehre
Ek Pal Ki Bhi Zindagi Na Tere Baad Mile
Saansein Meri Nikle Teri Saanson Se Pehle
Tu Mujhe Aakar Mila
To Aise Laga Ek Jism Ko Sar Mila
Dhoop Main Shajar Mila
Ek Awaara Ko Ghar Mila

Barso Se Lage Jo Vo Pyaas Bujhi Na
Behne Jo Lagi To Main Aaj Ruki Na
Tune Chhua To Laga Jag Si Gayi Mai
Jo Aaj Lagi Vo Kabhi Aag Lagi Na

Tum Yun Mile, Yun Mile, Yun Mile Ho
 
Tum Yun Mile Ho, Tum Yun Mile Ho

Woh tassavur ka aalam
Woh dil-e-aashiqui
Woh diwaana mausam
Woh teri dillagi
Hamko bada hi kare beqaraar
Woh pyaar pyaar pyaar

Woh pyaar pyaar pyaar
Pyaar pyaar pyaar pyaar

Baahon ke woh ghere
Zulf ka woh baadal
Hamko bada hi kare beqaraar

Pyaar pyaar pyaar pyaar

Woh mere bin bole
Tera samajh lena
Woh ishaaron se hi

Hamko bada hi kare beqaraar

Pyaar pyaar pyaar pyaar

Roothh ke woh jaana
Laut ke phir aana

snippet.title: Tu Ki Sei Sapan Pari | Full Video Song | Chhaki Suna | Anubhav Mohanty | Sheetal | Swayam | Antara
snippet.description:
#AmaraMuzikOdia #TuKiSeiSapanPari #OdiaMovieSong #OdiaSong #ChhakiSuna #OdiaMovie #AnubhavMohanty #SwayamPadhi #AntaraChakraborty #SheetalPatra #LoveSong #romanticsong 

Love is a beautiful journey filled with unforgettable moments, cherished memories, and heartfelt emotions. Tu Ki Sei Sapan Pari captures the essence of true love through its soulful melody, touching lyrics, and mesmerizing vocals.

Let yourself be carried away by this romantic musical experience that celebrates the magic of togetherness, dreams, and everlasting affection. Whether you're in love or reminiscing about special memories, this song is sure to touch your heart.

üé∂ Watch, enjoy, and immerse yourself in the beauty of love with Tu Ki Sei Sapan Pari.

Song Credits 
Singer : Swayam Padhi and Antara Chakraborty
Lyrics : Nihar Priyaashish
Music : Baidyanath Dash
Choreographer  : Bidyut Sethi
Song DOP : Akshay Nayak
Original Credits 
Music : Abhijit Majumdar 
Lyrics : Dr. Nirmal Nayak

Il 17 giugno 2026, la nazionale di calcio argentina affronter√† la determinata nazionale di calcio algerina in un cruciale scontro della fase a gironi della Coppa del Mondo FIFA 2026 (W26), riprodotto fedelmente nel gameplay di EA Sports FC 26! L'Argentina scende in campo con una fiducia incrollabile: passaggi fluidi, movimenti precisi e un attacco brillante in grado di scardinare qualsiasi linea difensiva. L'Algeria, tuttavia, √® pronta a ribaltare ogni pronostico. Con un ritmo esplosivo, un pressing aggressivo e pericolosi contropiedi, non ha intenzione di giocare sul sicuro.

id.description:
PORTUGAL vs DR CONGO | Piala Dunia FIFA 2026 Grup K | Simulasi & Prediksi Pertandingan Lengkap Gameplay PES 2021

Ini adalah video game eFootball PES 2021 (Pro Evolution Football). Game ini menampilkan grafis yang menakjubkan dan modifikasi realistis, menjadikannya game simulasi sepak bola yang sangat realistis. Ini hanyalah prediksi pertandingan dan hanya untuk tujuan hiburan.

Terima kasih telah menonton video ini. Jika Anda menyukainya, silakan sukai, beri komentar, dan bagikan.

Berlangganan dan sukai untuk video lainnya, terima kasih

Dengan fitur realistis, oleh KYRGYZ PUBG memberikan hiburan dan pemahaman terbaik tentang pertandingan sepak bola dalam sebuah video game.

Pernyataan Penafian Hak Cipta Berdasarkan Bagian 107 dari Undang-Undang Hak Cipta 1976, izin diberikan untuk "penggunaan wajar" untuk tujuan seperti kritik, komentar, pelaporan berita, pengajaran, beasiswa, dan penelitian. Penggunaan wajar adalah penggunaan yang diizinkan oleh undang-undang hak cipta yang mungkin melanggar hak cipta. Penggunaan nirlaba, pendidikan, atau pribadi dianggap sebagai penggunaan wajar.

snippet.title: Deva Hits Collection | Best Audio Melodies & Romantic Songs
snippet.description:
Immerse yourself in the golden era of South Indian music with the Best Audio Melodies & Romantic Songs composed by the "Thenisai Thendral" Deva. This curated jukebox brings you a nostalgic journey through the most soulful, heart-touching, and iconic melody hits that defined the 90s and 2000s.
Whether you are looking to unwind, relive classic romantic moments, or simply enjoy pure retro bliss, this Deva Melodies Collection is the perfect soundtrack for your day.

Deva Hits Collection, Deva Melody Songs, Best Audio Melodies, Deva Romantic Songs, 90s Tamil Melodies, Thenisai Thendral Deva Hits, Deva Classic Love Songs, Tamil Retro Playlist, Deva Non-Stop Audio Jukebox, Old Tamil Melody Songs, Romantic Tamil Audio Hits.

Lyricist: Anand Bakshi
